manifest.composition_order: dycore_step -> Thompson mp=8 -> MYNN bl=5 -> RRTMG LW/SW ra=4/4 -> Gen2 wrfbdy boundary
manifest.tolerance_rationale: M6B5 dycore-step tolerance plus 1e-10 abs cap for physics-tendency fields per ADR-007 fp64-strict exception.

transfer_audit.note: Comparator reads HDF5 before isolated validation calls; no production timestep loop is executed.
